persistence.example_zh: 他的堅持終於有了回報。

pharmacist.example: The pharmacist gave me the right medicine.
pharmacist.example_zh: 藥劑師給了我正確的藥。

pharmacy.example: I picked up my prescription at the pharmacy.

pianist.example: The pianist played a lovely tune.
pianist.example_zh: 鋼琴家彈奏了一首動聽的曲子。

pickpocket.example: Watch out for pickpockets in the crowd.

pilgrim.example: The pilgrim traveled far to the holy site.
pilgrim.example_zh: 朝聖者長途跋涉前往聖地。

pimple.example: She had a small pimple on her chin.
pimple.example_zh: 她下巴上長了一顆小痘痘。

pinch.example: Add a pinch of salt to the soup.
The tight shoes pinched her toes.

plague.example: A plague spread across the ancient city.
plague.example_zh: 一場瘟疫蔓延整座古城。
金錢問題不斷困擾著這家人。

plantation.example: They grow tea on a large plantation.
plantation.example_zh: 他們在一座大型種植園裡種茶。

playwright.example: The playwright wrote a famous play.
playwright.example_zh: 這位劇作家寫了一齣著名的戲劇。

plow.example: The farmer plowed the field before planting.
An ox pulled the heavy plow.

polar.example: Polar bears live in the cold north.
polar.example_zh: 北極熊住在寒冷的北方。

pony.example: The child rode a small pony.

populate.example: Settlers began to populate the valley.
populate.example_zh: 移民開始在山谷裡定居。

porter.example: A porter carried our bags to the room.
porter.example_zh: 一名行李員把我們的行李搬到房間。

posture.example: Good posture keeps your back healthy.
posture.example_zh: 良好的姿勢能保持背部健康。

potent.example: The medicine is potent, so use it carefully.
potent.example_zh: 這種藥藥效很強，使用時要小心。

poultry.example: The farm raises poultry such as chickens.
poultry.example_zh: 這座農場飼養雞之類的家禽。

preach.example_zh: 神父宣講關於仁慈的道理。

precede.example: A short speech preceded the dinner.
precede.example_zh: 晚宴前有一段簡短的致詞。

precedent.example: The judge's decision set a precedent.

precision.example: The watch was made with great precision.
precision.example_zh: 這只手錶製作得十分精準。

predecessor.example: She learned a lot from her predecessor.
predecessor.example_zh: 她從前任那裡學到很多。

prehistoric.example_zh: 這個洞穴裡有史前壁畫。

premiere.example_zh: 我們參加了這部電影的首映。

preside.example: The chairperson presided over the meeting.

prestige.example: The award added to her prestige.
prestige.example_zh: 這個獎項提升了她的聲望。

preview.example: We watched a preview of the new film.
preview.example_zh: 我們看了那部新片的預告。

preview.example: You can preview the document before printing.
preview.example_zh: 列印前你可以先預覽文件。

probe.example: The space probe sent back photos of Mars.
probe.example_zh: 這個太空探測器傳回了火星的照片。

probe.example: Police probed the cause of the fire.
probe.example_zh: 警方調查了起火的原因。

procession.example: A funeral procession moved down the street.
procession.example_zh: 一支送葬隊伍沿街行進。

proficiency.example: The test measures your English proficiency.
proficiency.example_zh: 這項測驗評量你的英語能力。

prohibition.example: There is a prohibition on hunting here.

propel.example: The engine propels the boat forward.

prose.example: She writes both poetry and prose.

prosecute.example: The state will prosecute the thief.

prospective.example_zh: 這家店歡迎潛在的買家。

prototype.example: Engineers built a prototype of the car.
prototype.example_zh: 工程師打造了這款車的原型。

proverb.example: An old proverb says haste makes waste.
proverb.example_zh: 有句古諺說欲速則不達。

provincial.example: She works for the provincial government.

provisional.example_zh: 他們達成了一項臨時協議。

psychiatry.example: He studied psychiatry to help the mentally ill.
psychiatry.example_zh: 他研讀精神醫學以幫助精神病患。

psychic.example: Some people claim to have psychic powers.
psychic.example_zh: 有些人聲稱自己有通靈能力。

publicize.example: They publicized the event on social media.
publicize.example_zh: 他們在社群媒體上宣傳這場活動。

puff.example: A puff of smoke rose from the chimney.
He puffed hard after the run.
puff.example_zh: 跑完步後他喘得很厲害。

punctual.example: She is always punctual for meetings.

purity.example: We tested the purity of the gold.
purity.example_zh: 我們檢驗了這塊黃金的純度。

quake.example: The ground quaked during the earthquake.

quake.example_zh: 這場地震毀了許多房屋。

qualification.example: She has the right qualifications for the job.
qualification.example_zh: 她具備這份工作所需的資格。

radiant.zh: 容光煥發的、光芒四射的
radiant.example: The bride looked radiant on her wedding day.
radiant.example_zh: 新娘在婚禮當天容光煥發。
